meaning: n.嗜酒的人,酒的行家,酒品尝家
examples: ABSTRACT: Don't know what to give as a present to your wine-lover friend? Take a look at these accessory gifts for oenophile.
If the hardware and software could be made sophisticated enough, there would be no functional difference, Dr. Dennett suggested, between a human oenophile and the machine.
These are oxidative whites beloved by wine nerds but something that a non-oenophile might think was a bottle gone bad.
Likened to an underground palace by the local press, the oenophile Tang pinned the blame for the structure on his wife, Lisa Kuo.
He was soon as renowned downtown as a gourmand, oenophile and host of epic parties in his loft as he was as a contributor to a middlebrow weekly.
